commitStrategyReview.notes: Separated the original mixed worktree into atomic plan documentation, governance preflight, theme surface, and consumer migration units.

units.purpose: archive the completed 007 plan and author 008 around atomic SCSS refactor units

summary: archive the completed 007 scss plan from the active root
rewrite plan 008 around atomic governance and style units
keep the plan inventory aligned with active and archived plan state

units.purpose: introduce planning-side gatekeeper preflight checks and synchronize the required governance documentation

summary: add planning preflight checks for lifecycle readiness and worktree coverage
synchronize governance workflows and documentation with the new preflight order
extend domain mapping and tests for the stricter gatekeeper flow

units.purpose: reduce wrapper theme layers and keep preset ownership focused on semantic variable assignment

summary: remove low-value landing theme wrapper files from the runtime surface
keep presets and shared contracts aligned to semantic variable ownership
preserve landing theme behavior while reducing theme indirection

units.purpose: update consumer-facing style modules to use semantic tokens, explicit mixins, and lint-compliant dashboard interactions

messagePreview.header: refactor(styles): migrate style consumers to semantic tokens
summary: replace consumer-side legacy color usage with semantic token consumption
standardize explicit mixin imports and responsive layout helpers
bring dashboard and invitation styles in line with project lint rules
